---
title: "OBFUS.CA/TE"
subtitle: "Online Bank for Understanding Statistics, Calculus, & Algebra:  Teenager Edition"
page-layout: full

---

## WHAT, DO?

Bienvenue! Before you is a resource for students, teachers, and parents. Its goals are:

- self-directed and guided lessons to learn high school math
- rich in media and interactive content
- a record of math culture in high school

::: {.callout-tip}
### How to use this site
1. Select a course from the top navigation bar or search for a topic.
2. Each page is a story to follow and learn.
3. Interact with the displayed content on some pages.
4. Try the consolidation problems, further practice, and view foundational, building block, and connection questions for each course.
:::
